justification: The question concerns the option-adjusted spread (OAS) of a corporate bond index, which is a standard indicator of risk and pricing in fixed-income financial markets.
question: Will the option-adjusted spread for the ICE BofA Emerging Markets Corporate Plus Index, which tracks the performance of emerging markets non-sovereign debt within major domestic and Eurobond markets, have increased by each resolution date listed below as compared to its value on 2025-08-17?
